message:
test(cli): expand robot-schema, robot-docs, robot-help coverage and fix drift baseline isolation

Add five new test functions covering previously untested robot CLI
surface area: robot_schema_without_beads_file_succeeds,
robot_schema_unknown_command_exits_with_listed_choices,
robot_docs_without_beads_file_succeeds,
robot_docs_invalid_topic_returns_error_payload_and_exit_code_two, and
robot_help_with_beads_file_succeeds.

Fix drift_without_baseline_exits_nonzero to copy the fixture JSONL
into a fresh temp directory instead of pointing --repo-path at an
empty dir, making the test deterministic regardless of ambient state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
